mapper.insert:
insert into agent_memory_detail(id, agent_memory_id, step_name, step_type, exec_content, return_data_format, parent_step_id, next_step_id, branch_condition, branch_route, model, create_time, update_time, status, reserver, remark) values
(#{entity.id}, #{entity.agentMemoryId}, #{entity.stepName}, #{entity.stepType}, #{entity.execContent}, #{entity.returnDataFormat}, #{entity.parentStepId}, #{entity.nextStepId}, #{entity.branchCondition}, #{entity.branchRoute}, #{entity.model}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.reserver}, #{entity.remark})
